recommendations.title: Birdboy: The Forgotten Children
recommendations.overview: Teenagers Birdboy and Dinki have decided to escape from an island devastated by ecological catastrophe: Birdboy by shutting himself off from the world, Dinki by setting out on a dangerous voyage in the hope that Birdboy will accompany her.

recommendations.title: Faust
recommendations.overview: A doctor in early 19th-century Germany becomes infatuated with the sister of a man he unintentionally killed and bargains with the Devil incarnate to conjure their union in exchange for his soul.

recommendations.title: Inuyasha the Movie 4: Fire on the Mystic Island
recommendations.overview: The mysterious island of Houraijima has reappeared after 50 years, and with its reappearance has brought the attack of four gods, the Shitoushin, who have their eyes set on the powers that protect and sustain the island. Now it's up to Inuyasha and h

recommendations.title: Hagazussa
recommendations.overview: In the 15th century, a young goatherd living alone in a mountain hut feels a dark presence in the woods.

recommendations.title: First Squad: The Moment of Truth
recommendations.overview: Set during the opening days of World War II on the Eastern Front. Its main cast are a group of Soviet teenagers with extraordinary abilities; the teenagers have been drafted to form a special unit to fight the invading German army. They are opposed b
recommendations.director: Alexey Klimov, Yoshiharu Ashino, Vladimir Zhelezniakov

recommendations.title: Ginger Snaps Back: The Beginning
recommendations.overview: Set in 19th Century Canada, Brigitte and her sister Ginger take refuge in a Traders' Fort which later becomes under siege by some savage werewolves. But when one of the girls is bitten, they have no one to turn to but themselves.

recommendations.title: April and the Extraordinary World
recommendations.genres: Thriller, Adventure, Animation, Comedy, Fantasy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: It's 1941, but France is trapped in the 19th Century, governed by steam and Napoleon V. Avril, a teenage girl, goes in search of her missing scientist parents.

recommendations.title: Miss Peregrine's Home for Peculiar Children
recommendations.overview: A teenager finds himself transported to an island where he must help protect a group of orphans with special powers from creatures intent on destroying them.

recommendations.title: KPop Demon Hunters
recommendations.overview: When K-pop superstars Rumi, Mira and Zoey aren't selling out stadiums, they're using their secret powers to protect their fans from supernatural threats.
